description: Extract all 22 tRNA gene sequences from the human mitochondrial reference genome (NC_012920.1) provided in ~/UGENE_Data/mitochondria/human_mtDNA.gb. Export the sequences to a multi-FASTA file at ~/UGENE_Data/mitochondria/results/human_mt_tRNAs.fasta. Perform a multiple sequence alignment using the MUSCLE algorithm and export the result to ~/UGENE_Data/mitochondria/results/mt_tRNA_alignment.fasta. Write a summary report to ~/UGENE_Data/mitochondria/results/tRNA_report.txt containing the total number of tRNAs extracted and the exact length in base pairs of the longest extracted tRNA sequence.
